title: Hyperdrive sled
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''hyperdrive sled''' was a device that, in much the same way that the [[Hyperspace transport ring/Legends|hyperdrive rings]] were used by [[Jedi starfighter]]s, allowed a vehicle without a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==History==
The sleds were most commonly used with [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighters]]. Such sleds used [[R1-series astromech droid/Legends|R1-series astromech droids]], and by [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] cost 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

Militia Leader [[Klyn Shanga]] used a beat-up, cobbled-together [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class]] engine as a makeshift hyperdrive sled when he and his fellow pilots hunted [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Two dozen [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of various make and manufacture were tethered to the engine during transit, with the ships' systems slaved to a [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]] on the central drive engine.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
